toneNote: Waning moon, Last Quarter midweek. Clear, close, rest. Protect your energy — this is a reset, not a push.
quarterTheme: Personal Year 1 · Identity reset, planting seeds. Do not rush to harvest the wrong thing.

lunar.event: Last Quarter Moon in Aries — Tue July 7, 3:29pm EDT
lunar.sign: Moon wanes from Aries early week, past the Last Quarter on Tue, into Taurus mid-week, then Gemini by Fri–Sat
lunar.weather: A waning, release-toned week after last Monday's Full Moon. The Last Quarter in Aries on Tue is a decision point — what do you cut so the second half of the lunar month has room? The real moment is Wed–Thu: the Taurus moon crosses your natal North Node (11°12′) and Lilith (9°52′) in the 2nd house, right where Chiron is working. Expect feelings around worth, money, and receiving to surface — that's the healing, not a problem. Let them move through. Rest is the assignment; you're integrating, not initiating.

transits.title: Jupiter conjunct your natal Venus — exact-ish this week
transits.note: Jupiter is now at ~2–3° Leo, sitting right on your natal Venus (2°10′ Leo, 6th house). This is the peak of the ingress you felt last week — expansion in love, in how your work is valued, in visibility. It's landing, not coming. Don't chase it or over-function to 'earn' it (Projector + waning moon both say receive). Name what you want and let it arrive.

transits.title: Taurus Moon over North Node + Lilith (Wed–Thu)
transits.note: The waning Taurus moon passes your 2nd-house self-worth points while Chiron sits nearby. Money/worth feelings may spike Wed–Thu. This is Chiron's long arc getting a monthly touch-point — meet it with a somatic practice, not analysis.

transits.title: Venus enters Virgo — Thu July 9
transits.note: Venus moves into Virgo, your Sun sign and 7th-house territory — a softer, discerning relational tone. Pairs with the Jupiter-on-Venus theme: partnership and how you value yourself are both lit. Note it; don't act from a wave peak.

actions: Rest is the protocol this week — waning moon + Projector. Protect the 9/9:30pm screens-off wind-down; bank sleep.
Keep omega-3 up: fatty fish 2–3× (wild salmon or sardines). Gentle movement only — walks, mobility, not intensity.
Adapalene Mon/Wed/Fri PM; Protini nightly. D + K2 with a fat-containing meal.
Somatic: hand on heart, especially Wed–Thu when the Taurus moon hits your worth points — 'It's safe to receive. I don't have to earn it.' Let the feeling move.
Waning-moon money work: this is a RELEASE week — clear, not draw. Free-write and burn one scarcity story ('I have to be exceptional to deserve it').
Practical: receive one thing without deflecting — a compliment, help, a rest window. Notice the flinch, stay anyway.
Jupiter is on your Venus — visibility is favored, but it's a Release week: plan and refine, don't force a launch. Position, don't push.
DemiPolished: light plan Mon — personality / life-maxxing. BGGG: Wed — one on-mission piece (toxins → Black health outcomes), no lifestyle drift.
Communion Skin: 15 min on the working-title shortlist. Low stakes — you're incubating (Jupiter in your 12th likes solitude first).
Jupiter-on-Venus + Venus into Virgo (your Sun/7th) is the warmest partnership weather in a while. Stay receptive; let it come to you.
Journal: what would I have to release to let someone actually see me?
Post-July-4th reset: one small finishing task, not a new project. Close a loop.
Water the cut-flower garden in the cool mornings; note first zinnia/dahlia cuttings.

dp: Mon: light DP plan — captions + static
Refine over create — it's a rest week
bggg: Topic: one environmental toxin → Black health outcome
shoot: Keep the load light — waning week

founderHour: Jupiter is landing on my Venus while the moon wanes. If expansion is already here, what am I ready to release to make room for it — what old story about having to earn my worth can I set down this week? (10 min, by hand, no editing.)
spiritual: Waning-moon release. This is the time to clear, not draw. Light a white or black candle for uncrossing/cleansing. Christian prayer anchors it — a prayer of release and surrender, handing over what you can't control. Hoodoo seals it: a simple cleansing (bath, floor wash, or petition to release a self-worth block), done on the waning moon. Then rest. Wed–Thu especially — be gentle with yourself as the Taurus moon stirs the worth wound.
mantra: I'm not behind. I'm resting on purpose — and what's mine is still landing while I do.
radar: Now — Jupiter conjunct your natal Venus: the love/visibility/value expansion is peaking. Ask about it when ready.
July 26 — North Node into Aquarius: activates your Aquarius Ascendant for ~18 months. Identity + visibility chapter. Eclipses follow.
Ongoing — Chiron in Taurus over your North Node + Lilith: the self-worth healing arc. The Taurus moon touches it monthly — worth a dedicated session.
